corrections.reason: Upstream GHSA/Packagist ranges end at <12.4.20 and =13.0.0, contradicting both the official advisory and GHSA's own first_patched_version (12.4.21 / 13.3.1). Confirmed by bin/diff-ghsa-fixed.php on 2026-07-07.

additions.reason: Filed on Packagist under typo3/html-sanitizer with constraints in sanitizer versions (<2.3.2), outside the typo3/cms* pool and unresolvable against TYPO3 version numbers. Mapped to TYPO3 versions from the official bulletin. The sanitizer ships with every TYPO3 install, so this is a core advisory. Covers CVE-2026-47344 (low) and CVE-2026-47345 (medium); recorded once under the dominant CVE.

advisory.title: By-passing Cross-Site Scripting Protection in HTML Sanitizer
